前端账户登录后: 前端用户登录成功后触发，允许其他模块监听登录事件并执行相应操作。
After Frontend Account Login: Triggered after a frontend user logs in successfully, allowing other modules to listen for the login event and perform corresponding actions.

前端账户登录后: 前端用户注册成功后触发，允许其他模块监听注册事件并执行相应操作。
After Frontend Account Login: Triggered after a frontend user registers successfully, allowing other modules to listen for the registration event and perform corresponding actions.

前端账户登录后: 在前端页面的 <head> 标签内注入内容，允许其他模块在前端页面头部注入额外的 CSS、JavaScript 或其他资源。
After Frontend Account Login: Injects content into the <head> tag of frontend pages, allowing other modules to inject additional CSS, JavaScript, or other resources into the frontend page head.

前端账户登录后: 这是 WelineFramework 的默认首页
After Frontend Account Login: This is the default homepage of WelineFramework

After Frontend Account Login: Module does not exist, please check the module name!

After Frontend Account Login: JS: The inject_path function path is not allowed to be empty!

After Frontend Account Login: Module %{1} failed to load: %{2} not found.

前端账户登录后: 模块 %{1} 加载失败：无法加载 %{2}
After Frontend Account Login: Module %{1} failed to load: unable to load %{2}

当前页面无需预加载模块
After Frontend Account Login: No preload module is needed for the current page

前端账户登录后: 系统会自动检测恢复状态，服务恢复后将自动刷新，无需反复点击刷新。
After Frontend Account Login: The system will automatically check the recovery status and refresh this page when service is restored. You do not need to keep clicking refresh.

前端账户登录后: 为什么网站会处于维护模式？
After Frontend Account Login: Why is the website in maintenance mode?

前端账户登录后: 网站可能发生系统升级事件，或者大多数的内容发生变化，程序员们正在维护或者升级数据以提供更加优质的服务。
After Frontend Account Login: The site may be undergoing a system upgrade, or most of the content has changed. Developers are maintaining or upgrading data to provide better service.

前端账户登录后: 大部分的网站升级活动都只有几分钟甚至几秒钟的时间。
After Frontend Account Login: Most website upgrade activities only last a few minutes or even seconds.
